title: VeloraOS 1.10.11 - Background Jobs & Secure Mobile
releaseNotes: Adds Secure Mobile Access status and certificate trust instructions for iPhone/iPad, Android, Windows and macOS.
Adds certificate download, expiry and SHA-256 fingerprint information in System Info.
Moves Chat generation to server-owned background jobs so replies continue when Chat is left or the browser/PWA is closed.
Reconnects active and completed model downloads after navigation, refresh or reopening the app.
Adds background Chat and model completion/failure notifications.
Preserves HTTPS, local CA trust, accounts, chats, installed models, licensing, device identity and secure rollback updates.
